meld-into-stone.canonicalEvidence: While merged with the stone, you cannot see what occurs outside it, and Wisdom (Perception) checks to hear sounds outside it are made with Disadvantage.
meld-into-stone.structuredState: Effect Type: UTILITY; no check disadvantage or outside-senses fields.
meld-into-stone.jsonState: Runtime JSON has only prose utility.
meld-into-stone.issue: Meld into Stone imposes a Wisdom (Perception) hearing disadvantage while merged, but that modifier is not typed.
meld-into-stone.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sense/check modifier fields for hearing outside the merged stone.
meld-into-stone.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime checkModifier data for Wisdom (Perception) hearing outside at disadvantage.
meld-into-stone.reviewerNote: Closed by adding DEFENSIVE resistance with eligible Damage Type values and Defense Damage Type Source chosen_damage_type in structured markdown and runtime JSON.

meld-into-stone.canonicalEvidence: If expelled, you move into an unoccupied space closest to where you first entered.
meld-into-stone.structuredState: Valid Targets: stone_surface; no expulsion destination fields.
meld-into-stone.jsonState: Runtime validTargets are ground only and has no expulsion destination rule.
meld-into-stone.issue: The spell requires a stone object or surface large enough to contain the caster and later expels to the nearest unoccupied entry-adjacent space.
meld-into-stone.recommendedTemplateChange: Add stone object/surface capacity targeting and expulsion destination fields.
meld-into-stone.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime target filter for stone object/surface large enough for caster and expelToNearestUnoccupiedEntrySpace.

meld-into-stone.canonicalEvidence: You step into a stone object or surface large enough to fully contain your body, merging yourself and your equipment with the stone for the duration.
meld-into-stone.jsonState: Runtime targeting uses ground and does not encode stone object/surface or capacity.
meld-into-stone.issue: The stone surface/object requirement is only partially represented and lacks the body-capacity constraint.
meld-into-stone.recommendedTemplateChange: Add surface/object material and capacity fields.
meld-into-stone.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime surfaceFilter material=stone and mustContainCasterBody.

meld-into-stone.canonicalEvidence: Nothing of your presence remains visible or otherwise detectable by nonmagical senses. While merged with the stone, you cannot see what occurs outside it.
meld-into-stone.structuredState: No invisibility/undetectable or blocked vision fields.
meld-into-stone.jsonState: Runtime JSON has only prose utility.
meld-into-stone.issue: Meld into Stone hides the caster from nonmagical senses and blocks outside sight, but those sensory states are not typed.
meld-into-stone.recommendedTemplateChange: Add nonmagical undetectability and blocked outside vision fields.
meld-into-stone.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime sensoryState data for nonmagical undetectable presence and cannotSeeOutside.

meld-into-stone.canonicalEvidence: You remain aware of the passage of time and can cast spells on yourself while merged in the stone.
meld-into-stone.structuredState: No awareness or self-only spellcasting allowance fields.
meld-into-stone.jsonState: Runtime JSON has only prose utility.
meld-into-stone.issue: The caster retains time awareness and self-spellcasting permission while otherwise constrained, but those permissions are not represented.
meld-into-stone.recommendedTemplateChange: Add awareness and self-only casting permission fields for merged states.
meld-into-stone.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime mergedState data for awareOfTime and canCastSelfSpells.

meld-into-stone.canonicalEvidence: If expelled, you move into an unoccupied space closest to where you first entered and have the Prone condition.
meld-into-stone.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no Prone status effect for expulsion.
meld-into-stone.issue: The expulsion Prone condition is not represented.
meld-into-stone.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional status fields tied to expulsion.

meld-into-stone.canonicalEvidence: You can use 5 feet of movement to leave the stone where you entered it, which ends the spell. Partial destruction or shape change expels you and deals 6d6 Force damage; complete destruction or transmutation expels you and deals 50 Force damage.
meld-into-stone.structuredState: No movement-to-leave ending or stone destruction/transmutation trigger fields.
meld-into-stone.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no conditional ending, expulsion, or force damage data.
meld-into-stone.issue: Meld into Stone has several conditional endings and expulsion damage branches that are prose-only.
meld-into-stone.recommendedTemplateChange: Add leaveCost, expulsion trigger, and branch damage fields.
meld-into-stone.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalEnding data for leave movement, partial destruction/shape change 6d6 Force, and complete destruction/transmutation 50 Force.

meld-into-stone.canonicalEvidence: You can use 5 feet of movement to leave the stone where you entered it, which ends the spell. You otherwise cannot move.
meld-into-stone.structuredState: No movement restriction or leave-cost fields.
meld-into-stone.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no movement restriction.
meld-into-stone.issue: Meld into Stone restricts movement except for a 5-foot movement exit.
meld-into-stone.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movementRestriction cannotMoveExceptExit with exitCost 5 feet.

melfs-minute-meteors.canonicalEvidence: You can expend one or two of the meteors, sending them toward a point or points you choose within 120 feet.
melfs-minute-meteors.structuredState: No one-or-two meteor spend or selected point fields.
melfs-minute-meteors.jsonState: Runtime JSON has one immediate damage effect.
melfs-minute-meteors.issue: The caster chooses to spend one or two meteors and can choose one or two destination points, but runtime has no charge/spend model.
melfs-minute-meteors.recommendedTemplateChange: Add expendable instance count and destination point choice fields.
melfs-minute-meteors.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime orbitingMeteorCharges=6 and spend 1-2 charges to selected point(s) within 120 feet.

melfs-minute-meteors.canonicalEvidence: Each creature within 5 feet of the point where the meteor explodes must make a Dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 2d6 fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
melfs-minute-meteors.structuredState: Save Stat: Dexterity; Save Outcome: half; Damage Dice: 2d6.
melfs-minute-meteors.jsonState: Runtime has 2d6 Fire Dexterity save half, but not the 5-foot point explosion or one/two meteor sequencing.
melfs-minute-meteors.issue: The save and damage are represented, but the point explosion radius and per-meteor sequencing are flattened.
melfs-minute-meteors.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime perMeteorExplosion area radius 5 feet tied to each spent meteor.
